items.title: Fantomska pretilost: Kad um ne prati gubitak kilograma
items.summary: NAKON brzog mršavljenja, mozak se ponekad ne može prilagoditi pa osoba i dalje percipira staro, veće tijelo.

items.title: Studija: Dizanje utega barem jednom tjedno snažno je povezano s duljim životom
items.summary: NOVA studija pokazuje da 30-60 minuta treninga snage tjedno smanjuje rizik od prijevremene smrti za 10-20 posto.

items.title: Muškarac je 48 sati jeo samo sardine: Evo što mu se dogodilo s tijelom
items.summary: Jeste li već čuli za trend poznat kao "post na sardinama"? Neki su ga isprobali i pokazali kakve posljedice može imati.

items.title: One in four births in England is now emergency caesarean, BBC analysis shows
items.summary: The shift marks a significant rise over the last five years, but experts say there is no single, clear explanation for the increase.

items.title: 'World-first' vaccine designed by artificial intelligence
items.summary: Cambridge scientists say they have, for the first time, tested a vaccine designed by AI.

items.title: Kafići se spremaju za nogometnu groznicu, kolekcionari očajavaju: "Nema sličica!"
items.summary: Do početka Svjetskog prvenstva ostalo je još samo nekoliko dana, a nogometna groznica već se osjeća na svakom koraku.

items.title: Tiha navika uzrokovana stresom trajno oštećuje zube
items.summary: STOMATOLOZI upozoravaju na ovu tihu naviku i nude rješenja poput udlaga.

items.title: Nije svaki šećer isti: Nova studija otkrila što fruktoza radi našem tijelu
items.summary: NOVA studija povezuje fruktozu s metaboličkim bolestima.

items.title: A study of 8,300 older adults revealed a surprising salt habit
items.summary: A large study of older adults in Brazil found that adding extra salt at the table is still a common habit, especially among men. While too much salt is linked to serious health problems and faster cognitive decline, researchers discovered that women’s salt-shaking habits were tied more closely to li

items.title: Scientists finally crack an “undruggable” pancreatic cancer target and nearly double survival
items.summary: For decades, pancreatic cancer has been one of the most lethal cancers, with few effective treatment options. A new drug, daraxonrasib, targets the KRAS mutation that fuels most pancreatic tumors—something many scientists once thought couldn't be done. In a major clinical trial, the treatment n

items.title: Kako zaustaviti migrenu prije nego što počne?
items.summary: PRODROMALNA faza migrene najavljuje glavobolju 24-48 sati ranije.

items.title: Znakovi koji najavljuju migrenu i kako je spriječiti na vrijeme

items.title: Neurolozi otkrili što se događa s mozgom kada prije spavanja koristimo mobitel
items.summary: KORIŠTENJE ekrana kasno navečer ometa proizvodnju melatonina, što otežava spavanje i negativno utječe na pamćenje.

items.title: Scientists discover the master clock that controls biological growth and development
items.summary: A newly discovered genetic clock acts as the master timekeeper for development, orchestrating crucial bursts of gene activity throughout a worm’s growth. When the clock is disrupted, development stops, offering fresh clues about how growth-related disorders may arise.
